use_cases: Create smooth edge transitions at the top or bottom of scrollable content areas
Add visual depth with frosted glass-like fading effects in hero sections
Implement decorative overlays in card or modal designs
Enhance page layouts with subtle gradient blur transitions between sections
Apply clean fade effects to image galleries or media containers
ai_summary: A lightweight atomic component that renders a progressive blur and gradient fade overlay positioned at the top or bottom of its container. Uses CSS backdrop-filter blur with gradient masking to create a smooth glass-morphism style transition effect. Configurable via props for position, color, height, and blur intensity. Non-interactive decorative utility for enhancing visual polish in scrollable interfaces.
